response:
SELECT s.student_name
FROM students s
JOIN (
    SELECT student_id, COUNT(*) AS like_count
    FROM likes
    GROUP BY student_id
) AS like_counts ON s.student_id = like_counts.student_id
WHERE like_counts.like_count = (
    SELECT MAX(like_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS like_count
        FROM likes
        GROUP BY student_id
    ) AS subquery
);
